where do i start let me start with the check in process it was haywire this is not a hotel but a residence firstly i was not informed that we cannot check in at the check in counter instead we had to go look for the agent who apparently when we arrived had gone for lunch we had to wait for the agent for minutes to check in then the check out process is another haywire thing we were not aware that you cannot bring cars nothing written in the terms and condition only at check in my husband were told and by then we already came here in cars and too late to plan our arrival for only car pls be aware that the parking here cost me another rm

the staff hasan was so rude upon checking out i knew this was only an apartment bnb and not the hotel this explains the bed bugs lizard and cockroach inside the room amazingly the staff was asking for photos of these insects when i reported it how could i even take a photo of it when i would immediately scream if i see these insects how could i take photo of bed bugs when even a naked eye cannot see it it was totally horrible experience st floor smells like athlete s foot due to the wet carpet i have no issues with bnb but atleast i am expecting the staff to have even a bit of customer service

scam alert everything was fine until when we want to drive out from the car park the access card was not working and the management asked us to pay rm to open the gate for us which they said they will refund us after the investigation however a few weeks passed and they refused to refund us the rm falsely accusing us for accessing the car park with the tng card when we said we want to check the cctv they said we need to be accompanied by a police to see the cctv so we should just buy an air tickets go back to malaysia so we can have police to accompany us to see the cctv footage we confirmed that we did not use any tng card to access the card park as we do not have the tng card this is scam be careful all travelers to kl

according to the out door parking charges table i received the fee is rm for the first hours and rm for every additional hour i parked from pm until am the next morning which is a total of hours based on the stated charges the total should be rm rm for the first hours rm for the additional hours however customer service charged me rm i was informed that after am the charges reset for another hour block but this condition was not stated or declared in the parking charge schedule provided

please improve the overall cleanliness tidiness facility readiness room odour and guest hospitality i had high expectations for the room but it turned out to be quite disappointing the cleanliness and smell were poor upon arrival causing us to sneeze frequently and our children felt uncomfortable throughout the stay additionally the elevators nearest to our room were not functioning forcing us to walk a considerable distance while carrying heavy bags during check out the staff were also not particularly welcoming or friendly upon our arrival based on this experience i would not consider staying here again for future vacations

we booked the executive bedroom apartment and had a wonderful stay the unit came with two bedrooms and two bathrooms with one bedroom having an attached bathroom this was my first apartment style stay experience and it definitely exceeded my expectations the apartment was located on the rd floor at block a and the check in process was smooth we collected our keys from the designated check in counter and although check in and check out were self service the staff were friendly and helpful whenever assistance was needed one of the biggest advantages of this property is its location trx mall is only about a minute walk away within just a few minutes walk there are plenty of food options including chinese restaurants mamak eateries durian stalls and even a mcdonald s nearby getting a grab was also very easy and convenient the apartment itself was very new clean and comfortable the air conditioning worked perfectly and i especially liked that we could adjust the room temperature to our preference the unit was well equipped with kitchen utensils including knives scissors and other essentials there was also a washing machine available for guests who wish to do laundry netflix was provided in the living room which was a nice bonus there were no tvs in the bedrooms but that wasn t an issue for us the only minor things to note are that facial tissues and laundry detergent were not provided so it would be good to bring your own if needed overall this was an excellent stay the apartment was clean comfortable well located and great value for money i would definitely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting the trx area

stay away it will ruin your holidays we had an awful experience at deface platinum in kuala lumpur when we first arrived the check in process took almost two hours it was so frustrating and when we finally got to our room it was infested with bed bugs we immediately informed the staff but instead of helping us right away they told us we d have to wait until the next day for a room change this is completely unacceptable especially considering there were also ants all over the apartment to make things worse the hotel demanded a hefty rm deposit which they promised to return within business days after the stay that s an incredibly long time to wait for a refund on top of that we were four people yet they only gave us one key to the entire apartment how is that even possible the pool area was always overcrowded and there are restricted times to access it requiring you to have a key to get in this place really needs to rethink their service and facilities i would not recommend this hotel to anyone as my experience was nothing short of a disaster
